'''Soren''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|starship component factory]] located in the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]]. Following an unsuccessful attempt to destroy the ''[[Compellor]]'' in the [[Goff system/Legends|Goff system]] at the [[Goff Platform]], ''Soren'' was discovered and [[Task Force Vengeance]] sent the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] to disable the factory, uncover any potential data about rebel activity and then place charges in the factory to destroy it in the [[Attack on Soren|First Battle of Mobetta]]. Rebel attempts to evacuate personnel through a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Goldhawk]]'' and a pair of [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] to the cruiser [[Crucible (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Crucible'']] failed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
